notes: Game crashes on start giving a "createDXGIFactory: FAILED" error unless it's run with "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%". With WINED3D WINE crashes when launching a mission but the main menu works fine although the performance in the main menu isn't all that great.
title: Flying Tigers: Shadows Over China

notes: The game runs without any tweaks. Performance is great. Scripted story voice lines don't play, you just hear the radio static sound followed by silence. Other voice audio such as the combat chatters works just fine.
title: Flying Tigers: Shadows Over China
